title: pelargonium × carolinaeum
intro: Pelargonium × carolinaeum, also known as Cape Rose or Red Tip Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × carolinaeum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of ointments or tinctures.
